channel.title: Science - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description: This diver was exploring the Great Barrier Reef, when he noticed something strange…  BBC Wildlife Magazine

item.title: 7 Meters Long, with 9-Centimeter Sword-Like Teeth: Scientists Uncover a Near-Perfect Great White Shark Ancestor Packed with Sardines - Indian Defence Review
item.description: 7 Meters Long, with 9-Centimeter Sword-Like Teeth: Scientists Uncover a Near-Perfect Great White Shark Ancestor Packed with Sardines  Indian Defence Review
